name: Mustard-Roasted Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Wash and scrub the potatoes thoroughly.
3. Dry well and cut lengthwise into halves, then into quarters.
4. Cut the quarters further into halves or thirds (depending on size).
5. In a large bowl, combine mustard, olive oil, and Parmesan cheese; whisk until blended.
6. Add the potatoes and turn to coat evenly with the mixture.
7. Spread the potatoes on a lightly greased or sprayed baking sheet.
8. Sprinkle freshly ground pepper over the potatoes.
9. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until browned and tender. Serves 4.
